data.title: Dogecoin Is Waking Up And The Chart Looks Explosive
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) is flashing fresh bullish signals across both higher and lower timeframes, as traders spot a breakout from a long-standing descending channel and the formation of a classic bull pennant. com.
source: https://www.techgaged.com/dogecoin-is-waking-up-and-the-chart-looks-explosive/

data.title: South Korean prosecutors lose $48M of seized digital assets
data.description:
South Korean prosecutors lost approximately 70 billion won ($48 million) to a low-level phishing scam during a routine security check. Despite South Korea’s increased efforts to stop cryptocurrency scams, the country’s officials are investigating yet another theft and attempting to recover some of the stolen funds. South Korean prosecutors investigate loss of $48 million in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korean-prosecutors-lose-digital-assets/

data.title: Superstate Raises $82.5M to Scale Onchain Equity Issuance
data.description:
Superstate closed an $82. 5M Series B led by Bain Capital Crypto to expand from tokenized Treasuries into SEC-registered equity issuance onchain.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/superstate-raises-82-5m-to-scale-onchain-equity-issuance

data.title: Binance Wallet Rolls Out AI Tools to Track On-Chain Hype and Narratives
data.description:
Binance Wallet has introduced three new AI-powered discovery features, Social Hype, Topic Rush, and AI Assistant, aimed at simplifying how users identify emerging on-chain trends and token narratives. The tools are now live within the wallet’s web interface and are designed to surface real-time signals across multiple blockchains, including BNB Smart Chain, Solana, and Base.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-wallet-rolls-out-ai-tools-to-track-on-chain-hype-and-narratives/

data.title: Bitwise Debuts New ETF That Combines Bitcoin and Gold
data.description:
Bitwise Asset Management is doubling down on the "store of value" thesis with the launch of the Bitwise Proficio Currency Debasement ETF (NYSE: BPRO).
source: https://u.today/bitwise-debuts-new-etf-that-combines-bitcoin-and-gold

data.title: Trump sues JPMorgan over allegedly terminating bank accounts, putting debanking criticisms back in the spotlight
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/386780/trump-sues-jpmorgan-over-allegedly-terminating-bank-accounts-putting-debanking-criticisms-back-in-the-spotlight?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Space Faces Scrutiny After $20M ICO, Keeping More Than 5X The Target Raise
data.description:
Team says “$2. 5M target raise figure was a soft cap, not a hard cap. ”
source: https://solanafloor.com/news/space-faces-scrutiny-after-20-m-ico

data.title: Elon Musk Predicts AI Will Outpace Human Intelligence as Early as This Year

source: https://decrypt.co/355532/elon-musk-predicts-ai-outpace-human-intelligence-this-year

data.title: Cambodian scam rings facing disruption since kingpin’s arrest
data.description:
Arrests, money laundering service shutdowns, releases, and escapes are all part of an ongoing crackdown on Cambodian scam operations.
source: https://protos.com/cambodian-scam-rings-facing-disruption-since-kingpins-arrest/

data.title: Spotify launches AI-powered playlist feature in US and Canada
data.description:
Spotify brought a new tool to American and Canadian users on Thursday that lets paying customers build playlists through artificial intelligence commands based on what they already listen to. The Swedish company tested the “prompted playlist” feature in New Zealand before bringing it to North America. This marks another step in Spotify’s push to get […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/spotify-launches-ai-powered-playlist-feature-in-us-and-canada/

data.title: Strategy market cap down 40% after pivot from bonds to preferreds
data.description:
Strategy preferreds were supposed to fix the problems with bonds, such as principal repayment, but instead they brought a raft of new issues.
source: https://protos.com/strategy-market-cap-down-40-after-pivot-from-bonds-to-preferreds/

data.title: Telegram Transfers 5 Million TON to Channel Rewards
data.description: At 02:59, Telegram transferred 5 million TON to Channel Rewards. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction involved a significant amount of cryptocurrency, highlighting ongoing activities within the digital asset space.

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/22/brics-nations-china-and-india-dump-10300000000-in-us-treasuries-in-one-month/

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of Rick Rieder being elected Federal Reserve Chairman is currently reported at 32%, up 24% in the past week.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, Kevin Warsh's probability of being elected Federal Reserve Chair is currently reported at 45%, Rick Rieder's at 32%, Kevin Hassett's at 6%, and Christopher Waller's at 13%. Related reading: "The Last Candidate for Federal Reserve Chair: Rick Rieder's Stance on Crypto?"

data.title: Retail Dumps XRP In Panic As Setup Turns Explosive
data.description:
XRP sentiment has officially collapsed into extreme fear territory, and historically, that’s when some of the biggest rallies begin. According to social data shared by Santiment on January 22, XRP traders have turned deeply pessimistic following a sharp 19% drop from the January 5 highs. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/retail-dumps-xrp-in-panic-as-setup-turns-explosive/
